prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年北京大学在江西省理科（物理类）最低录取位次分别为约44名、43名、47名、41名、52名。整体呈小幅波动，2024年曾回升至41名，但2025年明显后移至52名，为近5年最低水平，较2024年后移11名；该校在江西省理科（物理类）招生计划2021–2024年均为17人，2025年扩至22人，2026年进一步扩至26人，连续两年扩招，累计增幅约53%。扩招意味着竞争分母增大，对位次产生后移压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2021–2026年稳居第2名，属全国顶尖学府，层次极高，位次波动天然受限；2026年高考周期声誉评价偏负面，涉及校园安全、宿舍政策等舆情；抖音热度排名第3（高热），综合热度超1135万，短视频曝光量极大，反映报考关注度持续高涨。历史投档异常记录显示2025年湖北提前批曾出现空档，但属个别现象，未形成系统性负面冲击；北京大学拥有A+学科数十个，涵盖数学、物理学、化学、生物学、计算机科学与技术、法学、经济学、中国语言文学、哲学等，学科实力居全国最前列，对高分考生吸引力极强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息类、电气工程等专业持续高热推荐；法学分化观望但仍是热门；新闻传播明显劝退。江西省2026年普通高考考生总数约47.49万人，较2025年（约47.25万）微增，竞争环境基本稳定；北京大学位于北京，属跨省招生。该校在江西省招生占比极小（约0.003%），地域偏好对顶尖考生影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次后移趋势、2026年招生计划继续扩招（+18%）带来的竞争加剧，以及北京大学作为顶尖学府位次波动天然受限的特征，在。预测2026年理科（物理类）最低录取位次约63名，区间56–70名。

- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术、智能科学与技术）
- 数学类（数学与应用数学）。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 北京大学在江西省理科（物理类）招生位次极高（全省前70名以内），竞争极为激烈。位次在预测区间（56–70名）内建议以二档专业为主攻方向、一档专业为冲刺目标、三档专业为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如55名以内）可重点冲击一档王牌专业（元培、计算机、数学）。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Peking University in Jiangxi Province's Science (Physics Category) were approximately 44, 43, 47, 41, and 52 respectively. Overall, there was slight fluctuation, with a rebound to 41 in 2024, but a significant drop to 52 in 2025, the lowest in the past five years, moving back 11 places compared to 2024. The enrollment plan for Science (Physics Category) in Jiangxi Province was 17 students from 2021 to 2024, expanded to 22 in 2025, and further to 26 in 2026, with two consecutive years of expansion, a cumulative increase of about 53%. Expansion means a larger competitive pool, exerting downward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Peking University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. It has consistently ranked 2nd in the Soft Science China University Rankings from 2021 to 2026, making it a top-tier institution with naturally limited ranking fluctuations. In the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, involving campus safety, dormitory policies, and other public opinions. It ranks 3rd in Douyin popularity (high heat), with a comprehensive heat index exceeding 11.35 million, indicating extremely high short video exposure and sustained high attention from applicants. Historical enrollment anomaly records show a vacancy in the 2025 Hubei early batch, but this is an isolated incident without systemic negative impact. Peking University has dozens of A+ disciplines, covering mathematics, physics, chemistry, biology, computer science and technology, law, economics, Chinese language and literature, philosophy, etc., with academic strength at the forefront of the country, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended. Law is divided in opinion but remains popular, while Journalism and Communication are clearly discouraged. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Jiangxi Province general college entrance examination is about 474,900, a slight increase from 2025 (about 472,500), with a basically stable competitive environment. Peking University is located in Beijing, involving cross-province enrollment. Its enrollment proportion in Jiangxi Province is extremely small (about 0.003%), so regional preferences have limited impact on top candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the downward trend in rankings in 2025, the continued expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (+18%) leading to intensified competition, and the naturally limited ranking fluctuations of Peking University as a top-tier institution, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for the 2026 Science (Physics Category) will be about 63, with a range of 56–70.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (Yuanpei) (Mathematics, Physics, Geophysics, Computer Science, Electronic Information)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Intelligent Science and Technology)
- Mathematics (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Information Science and Technology, Microelectronics Science and Engineering)
- Science Experimental Class (Guanghua) (Mathematics)
- Science Experimental Class (Law School) (Mathematics)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Physics (Physics, Atmospheric Science)
- Biological Sciences (Biological Science, Biotechnology)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Theoretical and Applied Mechanics, Engineering Mechanics, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Peking University's admission rankings for Science (Physics Category) in Jiangxi Province are extremely high (within the top 70 in the province), making competition very intense. For rankings within the predicted range (56–70), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch goal, and use Tier 3 majors as a safe backup. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 55), one can focus on aiming for top Tier 1 majors (Yuanpei, Computer Science, Mathematics).

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Peking University in Jiangxi Province's liberal arts (history category) were approximately 21st, 25th, 23rd, 27th, and 24th respectively. Overall fluctuation is minimal (between 16th and 22nd), with a baseline ranking of about 24th in 2025. The cumulative fluctuation over the past three years is only ±3 places, showing extremely stable trends. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Jiangxi Province has been 15 students from 2021 to 2026, unchanged for six consecutive years, indicating a constant enrollment scale and no additional competitive pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Peking University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science China University Rankings from 2021 to 2026, it has consistently ranked 2nd, making it a top-tier national institution with naturally limited ranking fluctuations. In the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, reputation evaluations are somewhat negative, involving campus safety, dormitory policies, and other public opinion. On Douyin, it ranks 3rd in popularity (high heat), with a comprehensive heat index exceeding 11.35 million, indicating extremely high short video exposure and sustained high attention from applicants. Peking University has dozens of A+ disciplines, including Chinese Language and Literature A+, Philosophy A+, Law A+, Sociology A+, Applied Economics A+, Business Administration A+, and Foreign Languages and Literature A+, placing its liberal arts strength at the forefront of the country.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is showing signs of divergence but remains popular; Chinese Language/Chinese is recommended; Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Jiangxi Province is approximately 474,900. Based on recent proportions, the history category is estimated to have about 207,000 candidates, a slight increase from 2025 (206,000), indicating a basically stable competitive environment. Peking University is located in Beijing, involving cross-province enrollment. The university's enrollment proportion in Jiangxi Province is extremely small, and regional preferences have limited impact on top candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the highly stable historical rankings (16th–22nd), the unchanged enrollment plan for six consecutive years, and the naturally limited ranking fluctuations of a top-tier institution like Peking University, no additional correction is needed. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for the 2026 liberal arts (history category) will be approximately 19th, with a range of 16th–22nd.
